title: Information processing apparatus, information processing system, information processing method, and recording medium
abstract: An information processing apparatus includes: display screen generation means configured to generate a display screen including a spatial image and additional information for a target portion, the spatial image being an image indicating a space including the target portion, the additional information being superimposed on the spatial image. The additional information is generated based on a distance from a position of a point of view from which the spatial image is viewed to the target portion in the spatial image.
claims:
Claims [CLAIMS] 1. An information processing apparatus comprising: display screen generation means configured to generate a display screen including a spatial image and additional information for a target portion, the spatial image being an image indicating a space including the target portion, the additional information being superimposed on the spatial image, wherein the additional information is generated based on a distance from a position of a point of view from which the spatial image is viewed to the target portion in the spatial image. 2. The information processing apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the additional information includes a dimension line and a dimension for the target portion. 3. The information processing apparatus according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the spatial image includes a three-dimensional image, and the display screen generation means is configured to change at least one of a position, an orientation, and an angle of view of a virtual camera located at the position of the point of view to change a display area in the display screen, the display area being an area in which the three-dimensional image is to be displayed. 4. The information processing apparatus according to claim 3, wherein the additional information includes first additional information in a case where the distance from the position of the point of view to the target portion is a first distance, and the additional information includes second additional information different from the first additional information in at least one of a number and type of items of information in a case where the distance from the position of the point of view to the target portion is a second distance different from the first distance. 5. The information processing apparatus according to claim 3, wherein the display screen generation means is configured to: generate the display screen such that the display screen includes the additional information in a case where the distance from the position of the point of view to the target portion is a first distance; and generate a display screen that does not include the additional information in a case where the distance from the position of the point of view to the target portion is a second distance different from the first distance. 6. The information processing apparatus according to claim 3, wherein 

 the display screen generation means is configured to generate the display screen such that, in addition to the additional information, designated additional information to be displayed based on input designation information is superimposed on the spatial image. 7. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein the target portion includes a first target portion and a second target portion different from the first target portion in a distance from the position of the point of view, and the display screen generation means is configured to: generate, as the display screen, a first display screen including first additional information for the first target portion; and generate, as the display screen, a second display screen including second additional information for the second target portion, the second additional information being different from the first additional information in at least one of a number and type of items of information. 8. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein the target portion includes a target surface, and the display screen generation means is configured to generate the display screen such that the additional information is displayed for the target surface, based on a size of the target surface in the spatial image. 9. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 8, wherein the display screen generation means is configured to generate the display screen such that the additional information is displayed for the target portion, based on an extension of the target portion beyond the spatial image. 10. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 9, wherein the display screen generation means is configured to generate the display screen such that another additional information different from the additional information in at least one of a number and type of items of information is displayed in a case where the target portion for which the additional information is displayed on the display screen extends beyond the spatial image. 11. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 10, wherein 

 the display screen generation means is configured to generate the display screen such that the additional information is displayed for the target portion, the target portion being specified based on input information that is input. 12. The information processing apparatus according to claim 11, wherein the input information includes at least one of user information identifying a user and specification information specifying the target portion. 13. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 12, wherein the display screen generation means is configured to generate the display screen such that the additional information is displayed for the target portion, the additional information being specified based on input information that is input. 14. The information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 13, further comprising display control means configured to control a display unit to display the display screen. 15. An information processing system comprising: the information processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 14; and a display apparatus connected to the information processing apparatus via a network, wherein the information processing apparatus further comprises transmitting means configured to transmit display screen information indicating the display screen to the display apparatus, and the display apparatus includes receiving means configured to receive the display screen information transmitted from the information processing apparatus, and display control means configured to control a display unit to display the display screen. 16. An information processing method comprising: generating a display screen including a spatial image and additional information for a target portion, the spatial image being an image indicating a space including the target portion, the additional information being superimposed on the spatial image, wherein the additional information is generated based on a distance from a position of a point of view from which the spatial image is viewed to the target portion in the spatial image. 17. A recording medium carrying computer readable code for controlling a computer system to carry out an information processing method comprising: 

 generating a display screen including a spatial image and additional information for a target portion, the spatial image being an image indicating a space including the target portion, the additional information being superimposed on the spatial image, wherein the additional information is generated based on a distance from a position of a point of view from which the spatial image is viewed to the target portion in the spatial image.
